response.overview: The footage opens to a sunrise reflecting off of a glistening sea. Picturesque depictions of green, sloping hills and cows grazing in pastures can be seen. Quaint cottages are also presented along the coastline. After this, the footage follows two fishermen as they depart to sea in a small boat. The images are set to melancholy Irish music.
response.title: Harry Mantel’s Vignettes: Irish Fishermen
